title: Apocalypse Gui
description: Apocalypse GUI, enhance the apocalyptic immersion of your adventure or modpack. Darker, greenish, and cracked menus, stained with mud, splattered with blood, and overgrown with green moss.
body:
You dreamed of it ? Here it is : the Apocalypse GUI ressource pack !

With Apocalypse GUI, enhance the apocalyptic immersion of your adventure or modpack, with this unique texture pack.
1.20.1 only
 
Darker, greenish, and cracked menus — stained with mud, splattered with blood, and overgrown with green moss.

🔧 Fully compatible with:

- Minecraft Vanilla
- Curios
- DragN's Livestock Overhaul!
- Entity Features
- Extinction Z
- Farmer's Delight 
- Furnish
- Guard Villagers
- Homyatos' Explosives
- Inventorio
- Inventory HUD
- Legendary Survival Overhaul
- Lit It Up
- Moa decor bath
- Moa decor cookery
- Moa decor garden
- Mod Menu
- MonoBank 1.1.4
- Paladin's Furniture
- Pocket GPS
- Polymorph
- Simple plane
- Simple Voice Chat
- Slot Machine
- Solar Cooker
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- [SBW] Superb Warfare
- Skart's Decorations
- [TACZ] Timeless and Classics Zero
- Traveler's Backpack
- Trash slot
- Ultimate Car Mod
- Zombie Extreme
- Zombie Survival Kit
